text: Record canonical transaction facts without losing financial precision or source provenance. Evidence: direct — the owner requires transaction description, amount and date, and trustworthy cross-account actuals; workflows UC-LEDGER-002 and UC-LEDGER-009.
target: Every accepted transaction round-trips its account, original description, exact base-10 signed amount, currency, required date facts, provenance, idempotency identity, and stable reference; erroneous facts are voided/superseded attributably rather than edited or silently deleted.
